SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABARCA, DANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEH, MAHER DBA BAY 2 BAY ASSET GROUP LLC, DBA BAY 2 BAY RESTAURANT SUPPLIES $80.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
